native_before_export_rules.bow_crossbow: Archer must have useful Band B active ranged role before non-Archers borrow bows.
native_before_export_rules.polearm: Dragoon must have useful Jump/reach play before non-Dragoons build around spears.
native_before_export_rules.katana: Samurai must have active katana/Iaido value before Equip Katana is a generic route.
native_before_export_rules.gun: Orator and Chemist gun texture must not turn into universal low-stat damage patch.
native_before_export_rules.heavy_armor_shield: Knight and Vanguard-style durability must not become default patch for every fragile build.
native_before_export_rules.knight_sword: Premium sword access must not recreate late-game sword monopoly.
native_before_export_rules.ninja_blade_two_hit: Active Ninja may be strong, but learned Dual Wield cannot become the only rational physical engine.

claude_review_request: Are the no-new-equipment and no-gil/price-edit constraints strict enough?

Do practical-online bands preserve native job identity before exports?
Are Equip Guns and Equip Knight Swords delayed enough?
Is this sufficient input for the prerequisite-tree and JP-cost draft?
